items.text: Business Intelligence and Business Analytics In a Nutshell

Power BI Business intelligence services empower various organizations to consolidate business data into a centralized platform, providing them with a holistic, real-time view of their operations and key performance metrics necessary for growth.
Folio3 is your reliable Power BI business analytics services provider, comprising all BI components, which include data warehousing, data quality management, reporting, and business analytics.

Our hands-on industry-wide prowess in building customized business intelligence solutions adds value to your business planning, real-time performance monitoring, data-backed decision-making, and process improvement.

items.text: Powered by our private labelled analytics solution, Intellifabric, we have built an architecture that provides a headstart to industrial needs for any customized analytics and reporting solution through our Microsoft Fabric services.

items.text: Power BI and Analytics Services We Offer

Folio3 delivers end-to-end business intelligence services designed for organizational scalability. Our certified team of engineers customizes BI solutions to overcome the industry’s unique data challenges.

We provide end-to-end Power BI business intelligence consulting services with an advisory support team, paving the way for a well-balanced BI implementation approach, BI solution architecture design, selection of the right tech stack, and setup of detailed data management policies.

We conduct BI needs evaluation, design optimized architectures, implement robust data governance, and develop core components (data lakes, dashboards, DWH), enhanced with predictive analytics through our AI-powered solutions, followed by a rigorous QA, migration, user adoption training, and continuous support.

We continuously reiterate and upgrade business intelligence solutions based on industry-specific and functional roles, dashboards, new data sources, and cutting-edge data analytics capabilities to meet the evolving BI needs, aligning with the market trends.

Our support services kick in post-BI implementation process with enhancements necessary to upgrade BI solutions developed by other vendors, so you can have the best possible and efficient BI solution available with no fear of costly downtimes.

As part of our Power BI business intelligence services package, we offer robust BI testing services for BI solution validation, resulting in effective and strategic decision-making based on timely, accurate, and high-quality data.
LOOKING FOR A TRUSTWORTHY BI PROVIDER?

items.text: Consolidation of disparate data sources through ETL/ELT, change data capture, and data virtualization into a unified view of organizational data sets for efficient data analysis and reporting.
We ensure business information reliability and accuracy by implementing validation rules, cleansing routines, and monitoring systems.
Our data storage solutions include data lake, a lakehouse, and DWH solutions across cloud and on-premise deployment environments for centralizing business data.
We build data analytics solutions that are a conglomerate of descriptive, diagnostic, predictive, and prescriptive insights to effectively tackle any industry problem.

We develop big data analytics, data mining, data science, AI, and ML capabilities embedded within business intelligence frameworks using our data science and AI services, helping you identify anomalies, major result drivers, make predictions, and forecasts.
Our intuitive and interactive dashboards and reports help you visualize key performance metrics and recommended insights that are easily accessible, interpretable, and actionable.

Our Power BI business intelligence services and solutions pass through robust data security practices and comply with data governance standards and policies to process, store, analyze, and safely access industrial data.
Letting business users access and analyze high-quality reports by using mobile devices for better team collaboration between BI users and enhanced customer experience.

Our Power BI business intelligence and data analytics services are equipped with self-service BI capabilities, serving non-technical customers and management-oriented users in carrying out data management and analytics activities with complete independence.

items.text: Benefits of Folio3’s business intelligence and analytics services
Our established project management practices enable us to achieve BI project goals regardless of time and budget constraints, as well as changing business requirements:
Converting raw business data into real-time actionable insights, containing dashboards to drive confident, data-backed choices across your business.
Granular visibility into workflows can help eliminate resource waste and process bottlenecks, promoting continuous development.
Discover behavioral trends and preferences to tailor engagement methods and increase lifetime value.
AI-driven forecasting models translate uncertainty into strategy, allowing you to anticipate market movements and operational needs.

items.text: Our team works with clients in real estate, construction, manufacturing, agriculture, financial services, retail, healthcare, energy, automotive, and logistics to transform their large data volumes collected from disparate sources into actionable insights for improved efficiency and opportunities for growth.
Market share analysis by therapeutic area
Reducing patient readmission rates with predictive analytics
Neighborhood sentiment analysis for property investment
Analysis of variables affecting a property’s long-term profitability
Monitoring and analysis of brokerage agents’ activities and performance
3D visualization heatmap for commercial real estate
Custom FAISS index for real estate listings deployment
Predictive maintenance analytics for refrigerated transport
Carrier and warehousing service providers’ performance analysis
Defining optimal delivery time, speed, and transportation mode
Plant and livestock wellness monitoring and evaluation
Farm machinery and equipment performance analysis
Sustainability initiatives impact and performance analysis
Feed and water consumption monitoring and analysis
RFID material tracking Power BI dashboards
AI bidding assistant for public infrastructure tenders
Project data visibility (project type, client’s name, project status, start and end date, etc.)
Project progress tracking (completion percentage, schedule performance index, cost performance index, cost breakdown)
Tracking and analyzing resource utilization (labor, materials, equipment, and subcontractors)
Identification, analysis, and prediction of construction project risks (delays, cost overruns, supply chain disruptions)
Project planning relying on industry trends (economic conditions, material costs, building patterns)
BI for electric vehicle charging demand modeling
Predictive pipeline corrosion monitoring system with Power BI
Drilling cost per barrel visualization techniques

items.text: Why Choose Folio3 For Power BI Business Intelligence Services
Over 15 years of experience delivering Power BI business intelligence implementation services to Fortune 500 companies, including our architects possessing 27 Microsoft BI certifications.
Enterprise-grade encryption and ISO 27001 certification offer complete safety of critical company data across all implementations.
Accelerated business intelligence deployment frameworks with fixed timescales, backed by 24-hour technical support and proactive monitoring.
Pre-configured business intelligence solution templates simplify the implementation of sector-specific reporting and compliance needs.
